q: In IVF treatment, hormones are used for which purpose?
options: To prevent the immune system from rejecting the embryo after implantation
To stimulate superovulation (multiple follicle development) so several eggs can be retrieved; and to prepare the uterine lining for implantation
To trigger spermatogenesis in males who have low sperm counts
To permanently suppress ovulation after a successful implantation event
explanation: IVF involves controlled ovarian stimulation using FSH/LH analogs to produce multiple oocytes; progesterone and estrogen are also given to prepare the endometrium for embryo transfer.
